name: Rohan Singh
title: DevOps Engineer
headline: I Engineer Reliable Systems.
I Automate Scale.
I Ship Without Downtime.
subtitle: DevOps Engineer specializing in CI/CD, Cloud Infrastructure & Secure Deployments.
about: From my early days as a React Developer Intern, I discovered a passion for what happens after the code is written — how it's built, tested, secured, and deployed. That curiosity led me from frontend development to becoming a DevOps Engineer who architects reliable, automated systems. At Panini8 Software, I've transformed deployment workflows, slashing lead times by 99% through Blue/Green zero-downtime strategies. I've integrated security scanning with Sonarqube, Trivy, and OWASP into every pipeline, eliminating 10+ critical vulnerabilities. I've even built an AI-driven LLM reporting engine that turns raw data into actionable insights. I don't just write code. I engineer the systems that make code reliable.
